positive: A highly detailed, minimalist graphic design featuring a stylized celestial map overlaying a lush, vibrant forest scene. The composition should be central and symmetrical, depicting interconnected botanical elements—such as glowing roots, stylized leaves, and constellations formed by gentle, glowing lines. Use a strong, deep jewel-toned palette (sapphire blue, emerald green, amethyst purple) contrasted with bright, ethereal gold accents. The style should be a blend of intricate art nouveau illustration and modern, crisp vector graphics. Focus on strong silhouettes and high contrast to ensure it prints sharply on fabric. Ideal composition for a central chest print. Clean lines, breathable atmosphere, dreamlike elegance.
negative: blur, noisy, lowres, text, watermark, signature, logo, cropped, bad anatomy, disfigured, extra limbs, jpeg artifacts, abstract, messy
